rulings.Case Title: DALAL METWALLY VS. AVON PRODUCTS, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons For Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction Declaration Of Bartek R Rejch
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 24, 2019 in Department 503, Line 1. Defendant Sherwin-Williams Company's Motion to Quash Service of Summons for Lack of Personal Jurisdiction is continued from July 24, 2019 to August 6, 2019 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m. per the written stipulation of the parties. = (503/CML)
